import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

def process_orders(xml_payload: str) -> list[dict]:
    root = ET.fromstring(xml_payload)
    orders = []
    for order_elem in root.findall("order"):
        order_id = order_elem.find("id").text
        status = order_elem.find("status").text
        orders.append({"id": order_id, "status": status})
    return orders

def validate_and_transform(xml_data: str) -> dict:
    tree = ET.fromstring(xml_data)
    config = tree.find("config")
    items = tree.findall(".//item")
    return {"config": config.text, "item_count": len(items)}

def extract_with_fallback(xml_payload: str) -> dict:
    root = ET.fromstring(xml_payload)
    primary = root.find("primary")
    if primary is None:
        primary = root.find("fallback")
    return {"data": primary.text if primary is not None else None}
